tables.name: activities
tables.description: Learning activities and courses catalog including compliance training, course metadata, duration, difficulty levels, and compliance categorization for training management

tables.name: certification_tracking
tables.description: Compliance certification lifecycle management tracking issued dates, expiry dates, days until expiry, compliance framework mappings (SOC2/GDPR/ISO27001), and renewal workflow flags

tables.name: compliance_risk_scores
tables.description: Risk assessment scores calculated as Impact × Likelihood for organization and divisions, including risk categorization, compliance framework assignments, and mitigation priorities

tables.name: critical_events_log
tables.description: Detected risk events requiring attention including mass overdue events, learning stagnation events, and critical skill gap events with severity classifications and acknowledgement workflow

tables.name: job_master
tables.description: Job role master data including job titles, job families, career levels, industry sectors, and role status for organizational structure management

tables.name: metric_trends
tables.description: Time-series analysis of compliance metrics including daily completion rate trends, velocity calculations, acceleration, trend direction, and next-period forecasts

tables.name: proficiency_scale
tables.description: Skill proficiency level definitions and scales used for assessing user skill competencies across the organization

tables.name: risk_metrics_snapshot
tables.description: Point-in-time and historical metric calculations across 8 different compliance metrics including training completion rates, overdue backlogs, skill coverage ratios, and critical skill gaps

tables.name: role_skill_mapping
tables.description: Mapping of required and mandatory skills to job roles, defining skill requirements and criticality levels for each position

tables.name: skill_master
tables.description: Master catalog of skills including skill names, categories, industries, and skill metadata for skills management and gap analysis

tables.name: transcript
tables.description: Training transcript records tracking user enrollments, completion status, assignment dates, due dates, completion dates, and training progress

tables.name: user_skill_proficiency
tables.description: User skill proficiency assessments tracking current proficiency levels, assessment dates, proficiency sources, and skill competency data

tables.name: users
tables.description: Employee master data including user identifiers, names, email addresses, organizational hierarchy (manager, division, department), job roles, employment status, and security settings

knowledge_base.name: hr_compliance_risk_knowledge_base
knowledge_base.description: Knowledge base for HR compliance risk monitoring, SOC2 and GDPR requirements, training completion tracking, and skill gap analysis

examples.name: hr_compliance_risk_examples
examples.description: Example queries and use cases for HR compliance risk analysis, training completion tracking, and certification management
